name: Narada Michael Walden
abstract: Narada Michael Walden ( NAH-rə-də; Michael Walden; born April 23, 1952) is an American musician, singer, songwriter and record producer. He began his career as a drummer, working primarily in the jazz fusion realm, appearing with John McLaughlin and the Mahavishnu Orchestra, Chick Corea, Jaco Pastorius, Tommy Bolin, Jeff Beck, Wayne Shor…

about_quotes.speaker: Lonnie Liston Smith
about_quotes.evidence: And even Narada Michael Walden, they were all in there together. And I came in right after they left
about_quotes.doc_title: Lonnie Liston Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 9, 2021

about_quotes.speaker: Lew Soloff
about_quotes.evidence: The drummer was Narada Michael Walden... And it was an astounding rhythm section.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lew Soloff interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000
